issues.description: Qualoop self-upgrade rule violation: Qualoop framework code has been modified (automation/__init__.py, automation/executors/base.py, automation/paths.py, automation/qualoop.py, automation/scheduler.py, automation/tester.py, automation/_qsum.py, automation/guardian.py), but no corresponding update was recorded in `reports/development-report.html`. Every Qualoop upgrade must be documented.
